description: Like catnip, a highly addictive agentic coding tool
A curated list of awesome tools, IDE integrations, frameworks, and other resources for developers working with Anthropic's Claude Code.
Let AI agents message, watch, and spawn each other across terminals. Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity CLI, Cursor CLI, OpenCode, Kilo, Pi, Kimi
the best interface for Claude Code
Build mods for Claude Code: Hook any request, modify any response, /model "with-your-custom-model", intelligent model routing using your logic or ours
Claude Code Commands Manager

Production-ready modular Claude Code framework with 30+ commands, token optimization, and MCP server integration. Achieves 2-10x productivity gains through   systematic command organization and hierarchical configuration.

SE-Agent is a self-evolution framework for LLM Code agents. It enables trajectory-level evolution to exchange information across reasoning paths via Revision, Recombination, and Refinement, expanding the search space and escaping local optima. On SWE-bench Verified, it achieves SOTA performance
A native policy enforcement layer for AI coding agents. Built on OPA/Rego.
Awesome Claude Code Resources, Projects、Prompts、Agents、Commands，everything about claude code! Claude Code 精选资源列表 （by 云中江树）
Unified Emacs interface supporting OpenAI Codex, Antigravity CLI, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI,  Opencode, and more
VS Code/Cursor extension for automating Claude Code tasks with intelligent queuing, batch processing, and auto-resume.
Lightweight MCP integration bringing Google's Gemini AI capabilities to Claude Code with 1M+ token context window, smart model selection, and powerful code analysis tools
Zed extension for Claude Code CLI integration
Agentic coding TypeScript boilerplate for Claude Code — sub-agent workflows with built-in quality checks and context engineering.
Full-featured GUI for Claude Code CLI in VS Code — Windows (no WSL) & macOS. Third-party API, MCP plugins, Skills, Hooks, real-time token tracking. Actively maintained.

Fast, cross-platform, real-time token usage tracker and cost monitor for Gemini CLI / Claude Code / Codex CLI / Qwen Code / Cline / Roo Code / Kilo Code / GitHub Copilot / OpenCode / Pi Agent / Piebald.
Claude Code Sub Agent Manager. A simple Manager for adding Claude Code Sub Agents with hooks and custom slash commands.
💻 Best practices and examples for using Claude Code - Anthropic’s terminal-native AI - for writing, editing, and refactoring code with deep project awareness, prompt design, and safe automation.

Autonomous agent substrate for Claude Code CLI. Research→Plan→Implement workflows with quality gates, TDD   enforcement, and multi-agent coordination. 4.8-5.5x faster development. Built on Anthropic's engineering research.
一步命令 npx kimicc 使用 Kimi K2 运行 Claude Code。
📜 An MCP server for conversation history search and retrieval in Claude Code
Hands-on crash course for Claude Code with branch-based projects on MCP, subagents, hooks, and automation.
A curated collection of system prompts and tool definitions from production AI coding agents
A high-performance Rust implementation of an OpenAI-compatible API gateway for Claude Code CLI.
Use Claude Code on Kanban WebUI
Comprehensive cross-platform toolkit for Claude Code
A web-based UI for interacting with the opencode API
A Python SDK for claude-code hooks
A curated collection of resources, papers, tools, and best practices for Context Engineering in AI agents and Large Language Models (LLMs).
Comprehensive MCP server providing real-time framework documentation access for Claude Code with intelligent caching, multi-source integration, and context-aware assistance.

SwiftLens is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides deep, semantic-level analysis of Swift codebases to any AI models. By integrating directly with Apple's SourceKit-LSP, SwiftLens enables AI models to understand Swift code with compiler-grade accuracy.
AI-powered annotations for localhost development. Create visual feedback on your apps and let AI coding agents automatically implement fixes via MCP integration.
Hook-based audio feedback for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI
🏆 The AI coding usage leaderboard — Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI & more. Real costs and tokens from ccusage data. Submit with: npx viberank-cli
Easy Claude Code devcontainer workflows
Ship 10x faster by running multiple Claude Code sub agents in parallel. GitHub-native orchestration for AI coding agents—no conflicts, no complexity, just pure parallelized productivity.
Transform Claude Code into a complete development platform with AI-powered commands that automate your entire software development workflow.
